title: Junior Instructional Designer at NIT Warangal International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at NIT Warangal International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
NIT Warangal International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NIT Warangal International Enterprises:
NIT Warangal International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIT Warangal International Enterprises!
